scripts.check: corepack pnpm build:shared && corepack pnpm build:server
scripts.smoke:lobby: corepack pnpm check && corepack pnpm --filter @bucs/server smoke:lobby
scripts.smoke:match-start: corepack pnpm check && corepack pnpm --filter @bucs/server smoke:match-start
scripts.smoke:combat: corepack pnpm check && corepack pnpm --filter @bucs/server smoke:combat
scripts.smoke:stocks: corepack pnpm check && corepack pnpm --filter @bucs/server smoke:stocks
scripts.smoke:match-end: corepack pnpm check && corepack pnpm --filter @bucs/server smoke:match-end
scripts.smoke:return-lobby: corepack pnpm check && corepack pnpm --filter @bucs/server smoke:return-lobby
